headline: Revolut Dumps USDT in August Amid Risk Fears

headline: Tankers Divert: 10 Vessels Reroute Via Iran

article.title: Tankers U-Turn in Hormuz, With Some Taking Iran Route Instead
article.summary: At least eight ships attempting to leave the Persian Gulf along the Omani coast turned back between Friday and Saturday, in the latest sign that reopening the Strait of Hormuz remains complicated by Iran seeking to assert its control over the key waterway.
